title: viola × albiensis
intro: Viola × albiensis is a hybrid species of viola, a genus of flowering plants in the family Violaceae, known for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. This plant is traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Viola × albiensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Viola × albiensis can be found in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, allowing for various applications in natural medicine and aromatherapy.
